name: Portable Solar Generator
what: A fold-out solar panel paired with a battery bank that powers devices, tools or a campsite entirely off-grid.
how: Photovoltaic panels charge an internal lithium battery; inverters output household AC and USB-C for phones, laptops and appliances.

name: Solid-State Power Bank
what: A pocket battery using a solid electrolyte for far higher density and near-zero fire risk versus today's lithium packs.
how: A ceramic/polymer solid electrolyte replaces flammable liquid, allowing thinner, safer, faster-charging cells.

name: Body-Heat Thermoelectric Charger
what: A wearable band that trickle-charges a device from the heat difference between your skin and the air.
how: Thermoelectric films use the Seebeck effect — a temperature gap across the material generates a small voltage.

name: Kinetic Motion Charger
what: Harvests the energy of walking or shaking to keep small devices topped up without a plug.
how: A moving magnet or rotor inside a coil induces current as you move — the same principle as an automatic watch.

name: Portable Hydrogen Fuel-Cell Charger
what: A hand-held fuel cell that turns a hydrogen cartridge into clean electricity with only water as exhaust.
how: Hydrogen from a swappable cartridge reacts with air across a membrane, generating current directly — refuel in seconds.

name: AI Wearable Assistant
what: A clip-on or pendant device with a camera, mic and always-ready AI that answers questions and remembers your day.
how: On-device and cloud AI process voice and vision in real time, surfacing answers, translations and reminders hands-free.

name: AI Smart Glasses
what: Glasses that overlay AI translation, navigation and object recognition onto what you see.
how: Micro-displays and bone-conduction audio pair with an AI that reads the camera feed and whispers context to you.

name: Local AI Home Server
what: A small box that runs powerful AI models entirely on your own network — private, offline, no subscription.
how: A compact GPU/NPU runs open models locally, serving chat, search and automation to every device in the home.

name: Real-Time Translation Earbuds
what: Earbuds that translate a conversation between two languages almost instantly, in your ear.
how: Speech AI transcribes, translates and re-synthesises voice in near real time, streamed back to the earbud.

name: Continuous Glucose Monitor
what: A coin-sized skin patch that tracks blood sugar in real time and streams it to your phone — no finger pricks.
how: A micro-filament under the skin measures glucose in interstitial fluid every few minutes via an enzyme sensor.

name: Health Tracking Smart Ring
what: A ring that measures heart rate, temperature, sleep and recovery around the clock from your finger.
how: Optical and thermal sensors on the inner band read pulse, HRV and skin temperature; AI scores sleep and readiness.

name: Portable ECG Monitor
what: A pocket device that records a medical-grade heart trace in 30 seconds to spot rhythm problems early.
how: Metal electrodes read the heart's electrical signal when you touch them; AI flags atrial fibrillation and anomalies.

name: Red-Light Therapy Panel
what: A light panel using specific red/near-infrared wavelengths studied for skin, recovery and circulation.
how: LEDs emit tuned wavelengths that penetrate tissue and are thought to boost cellular energy (mitochondrial ATP).

name: At-Home Blood Analyser
what: A device that runs a panel of blood biomarkers from a fingerprick at home and trends them over time.
how: A drop of blood on a test cartridge is read optically or electrochemically; results sync to an app with AI insights.

name: Non-Invasive Brain Interface
what: A headband that reads brain activity to let you control software, track focus, or type by thought — no surgery.
how: Dry EEG sensors read electrical brain signals; AI decodes patterns into commands, attention scores or text.

name: Diamond-Battery Micro Sensor
what: A tiny sensor powered by a nuclear-diamond cell that could run for decades without ever being charged.
how: A carbon-14 diamond betavoltaic cell trickles microwatts to a low-power sensor and radio — sealed and maintenance-free.

name: Holographic 3D Display
what: A display that shows true floating 3D images you can view from any angle without a headset.
how: Light-field or volumetric techniques project many viewpoints at once so each eye sees correct depth in mid-air.

name: Electronic Skin Patch
what: A stretchy, skin-thin patch of sensors that reads vitals, sweat chemistry and motion continuously.
how: Flexible printed electronics conform to skin, sensing temperature, strain and biomarkers, powered by body heat or motion.
